title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node and browsers; chat, stream, and manage local models.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration: use any Ollama model as an LLM, chat, or embedding provider in LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (formerly Ollama-WebUI): chat, multi-model, RAG, admin panel, dark mode.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; sync/async, streaming, pull/generate/chat/embed APIs.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive CLI wrapper for Ollama with chat history, syntax highlighting, and model switching.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-style VS Code extension that uses local Ollama models for inline suggestions.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Template repo for building RAG pipelines with Ollama, LangChain, and Chroma/Qdrant vector stores.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration: use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix package expression for Ollama with CUDA and ROCm variants; pinned builds for reproducibility.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up an Ollama service in CI pipelines for testing LLM-powered features.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with async streaming, chat, and model management; NuGet package available.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust crate for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, and pull models with Tokio runtime.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a local AI sidebar powered by Ollama for note summarization and Q&A.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that exposes Ollama models as slash commands or DM bots with rate limiting.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord.py bot bringing Ollama models to servers with chat, image, and moderation features.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir OTP client for Ollama with GenServer-backed connection pooling and streaming.

title: ollama-llamaindex
summary: LlamaIndex integration: use Ollama LLMs and embedders for RAG and agent workflows.
